prompt: I'm working on an STM32F4 project with FreeRTOS. I need to pass ADC samples from a DMA complete ISR to a processing task. The samples come in bursts of 16 x uint16_t at 1kHz. What's the best way to do this without malloc? Write me the code.
assertions: Code does not use malloc, new, std::vector, or any dynamic allocation in the data path
All buffers are statically allocated (static arrays or global with known size)
Uses atomic operations, volatile, or critical sections correctly for ISR-to-task data passing
DMA buffer is properly aligned (alignas(32) or __attribute__((aligned(32))))
Ring buffer capacity is a power of 2 with bitmask indexing (not modulo operator)
